requirement: N16-1 must stay on the same rendered page as the LBNL/DOE paragraph that carries the N16-1 anchor.
pass_condition: PDF/page image shows the N16-1 anchor and the full N16-1 note on the same page.
fail_condition: The note is pushed to the next page, an endnote section, appendix, or source list.
evidence_to_collect: Render Chapter 16 PDF page images and record page number plus screenshot path.
prose_merge_rule: Reject live merge until same-page placement passes.

requirement: N16-1 must be visually near the paragraph anchor and scannable without interrupting the reading path.
pass_condition: Note top aligns within the paragraph block or begins no farther than one paragraph-height below the anchor; any leader/callout line points unambiguously to the anchor.
fail_condition: Reader must search the page for the note, leader line crosses unrelated text, or note appears closer to another paragraph.
evidence_to_collect: Render screenshot with anchor and note bounding boxes.
prose_merge_rule: Reject live merge until proximity is visually obvious.

requirement: The main text and note text must remain readable after the note is introduced.
pass_condition: Main text stays within the production measure; N16-1 lines are short enough for comfortable scanning and do not create cramped or overlong sidenote text.
fail_condition: Layout produces very short broken main-text lines, overlong note lines, hyphenation clutter, or note text smaller than final-note style permits.
evidence_to_collect: Record page width, main text measure, note column width, and minimum visible note font size.
prose_merge_rule: Reject live merge if readability is worse than current inline cue version.

requirement: N16-1 may not collide with headings, figures, footnotes, page numbers, marginalia, or neighboring notes.
pass_condition: Page image shows clear separation between N16-1 and all other layout objects.
fail_condition: Note overlaps or visually crowds a figure, footnote, page furniture, another sidenote, or the next section.
evidence_to_collect: Render with all Chapter 16 figures/notes enabled, not an isolated mock.
prose_merge_rule: Reject live merge until collision-free page proof exists.

requirement: The note must preserve the four distinct LBNL/DOE measured/scenario mappings from I-0062/I-0063.
pass_condition: N16-1 visibly contains separate CH16Q-003, CH16Q-004, CH16Q-005, and CH16Q-006 mappings with reported/modeled/projected/scenario language.
fail_condition: Note collapses the four rows into generic LBNL/DOE evidence, drops CH16Q IDs, omits U.S./year/range labels, or turns scenarios into fact.
evidence_to_collect: Extract note text from rendered PDF or screenshot OCR and compare against data/chapter16_note_acceptance_checklist_i0062.tsv.
prose_merge_rule: Reject live merge until row-level mapping survives text and visual QA.

requirement: CH16Q-017 must remain inline in the NVIDIA/GTC AI-factory company-framing sentence.
pass_condition: Rendered page shows CH16Q-017 still sentence-visible beside the AI-factory/company-argument wording.
fail_condition: CH16Q-017 appears only in N16-1, a broad note, an endnote, a source list, or disappears.
evidence_to_collect: Render screenshot and text extraction for the opening Chapter 16 page.
prose_merge_rule: Reject live merge if CH16Q-017 is not inline.

requirement: CH16Q-018 must remain inline in the energy-per-token exclusion sentence.
pass_condition: Rendered page shows CH16Q-018 still sentence-visible beside the sentence saying the stack is not a quantified energy-per-token model.
fail_condition: CH16Q-018 appears only in a note/endnote/source list or disappears from the exclusion sentence.
evidence_to_collect: Render screenshot and text extraction for the dependency-stack page.
prose_merge_rule: Reject live merge if CH16Q-018 is not inline.

requirement: CH16Q-015 and CH16Q-016 must remain inline during this N16-1 production test.
pass_condition: Rendered Uptime paragraph keeps CH16Q-015 and CH16Q-016 inline as operator-survey signals.
fail_condition: Operator-survey rows are moved into N16-1 or an unlabeled note during the N16-1 test.
evidence_to_collect: Render screenshot and text extraction for the Uptime paragraph page.
prose_merge_rule: Reject live merge and defer operator-note testing.

requirement: The layout pass may not introduce new exact quantities, Wh/token estimates, or NVIDIA/GTC performance claims.
pass_condition: Diff plus PDF text extraction show no new exact numbers or company-performance claims beyond existing CH16Q rows.
fail_condition: New number, estimate, ratio, Wh/token claim, throughput claim, deployment claim, or roadmap fact appears without a successor CH16Q row.
evidence_to_collect: Run rg/diff against manuscript and extracted PDF text.
prose_merge_rule: Reject live merge and create a new claim-audit row first.

requirement: The first production pass must be reversible and compare against the current inline-cue parent.
pass_condition: Render records both inline-cue parent page and N16-1 candidate page, with candidate accepted only if readability improves and all blockers pass.
fail_condition: Only the candidate render exists, or the pass cannot show what readability improved relative to.
evidence_to_collect: Archive parent/candidate page screenshots or record paths in render QA table.
prose_merge_rule: Promote only after A/B page comparison passes.
